source_pr.title: test: fix shard row id bits test
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Fix #14261.

### What is changed and how it works?

Start the transaction 100 times instead of once to reduce the possibility of a test failure.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test

Code changes

Side effects

Related changes

Release note

symptoms: PR body: reduce the possibility of a test failure (shard row id bits test)
failure_signature: PR body: reduce the possibility of a test failure (shard row id bits test)
root_cause_explanation: The test depended on a probabilistic property of `shard_row_id_bits` / `AUTO_RANDOM` handle generation and could fail rarely. The PR reduces the failure probability by turning a single bulk INSERT (one transaction) into 100 separate INSERT statements (many transactions), effectively sampling handle/shard bits multiple times and lowering the chance of hitting the problematic edge case in one run.
fix_pattern: Replace a single bulk INSERT with multiple individual INSERT statements to reduce probabilistic flakiness in `shard_row_id_bits` / `AUTO_RANDOM` related tests.

evidence: evidence: PR body: reduce the possibility of a test failure (shard row id bits test)
evidence: replace bulk insert with 100 individual inserts (executor/ddl_test.go)
